goal: Build a crypto portfolio tracker with: Binance API sync, real-time price alerts, portfolio charts, user auth, and social sharing of performance

expected_output.goal_summary: A crypto portfolio tracker connecting to Binance with alerts, visualization, and social features
expected_output.reasoning: Everything else depends on live data. No sync = no product.

notes: This is the built-in demo. Run with: python main.py --demo
